query:
ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS organizationInn varchar(12) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS organizationName varchar(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS canApprove boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ZrXh2G47LDMzHc.root --database VXtoDUdEwYg7oM9YoGZrE3 --execute ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS organizationInn varchar(12) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS organizationName varchar(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS canApprove boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;
